title: Reset your password
body: Users can reset passwords from Settings > Security > Reset password. If SSO is enabled, redirect them to their identity provider.

title: Duplicate charge workflow
body: If a duplicate charge is confirmed, apologise, explain the duplicate invoice ID, and offer a refund or account credit. Refunds over $200 require supervisor approval.

title: Upload failure known issue
body: File uploads larger than 100MB may fail on older workspaces. Ask for workspace ID, file size, timestamp, and browser console screenshot. Known incident MC-231 is under engineering review.

title: CSV export availability
body: CSV export is available on Pro and Enterprise plans from Reports > Export. Starter users can export summaries but not raw row-level data.

title: Proration policy
body: Plan upgrades are charged immediately on a prorated basis. Downgrades apply at the next billing cycle unless support grants an exception.
